name: swarm-prediction-api
description: MiroFish swarm intelligence prediction engine. Runs multi-agent simulations to generate crowd-sourced predictions on any topic using the OASIS framework.

payment.description: $0.25 per prediction call, paid via x402 on Base USDC

tools.name: predict
tools.description: Run a MiroFish swarm intelligence simulation to generate predictions on any topic. Spawns N agents with diverse roles (Analyst, Skeptic, Expert, Journalist, etc.) that debate and analyze the scenario across multiple rounds, then synthesizes a prediction report.

seed_text.description: The topic, scenario, or question to predict. Can be a news headline, market question, policy proposal, or any scenario.
examples: Will AI regulation pass in the EU in 2025?
Impact of raising minimum wage to $20/hr on small businesses
Bitcoin price trajectory over next 6 months

num_agents.description: Number of simulated agents in the swarm (10-500). More agents = richer predictions but slower.

rounds.description: Number of simulation rounds (1-50). More rounds = deeper emergent behavior.

prediction_id.description: Unique ID for this prediction run

top_narratives.description: 3-5 dominant narrative threads that emerged from the swarm

sentiment_distribution.description: Breakdown of agent sentiments: {positive, negative, neutral}

total_actions.description: Total number of agent actions captured in simulation

sample_actions.description: Sample of individual agent actions for inspection

prompts.name: predict-topic
prompts.description: Generate a swarm prediction for a given topic

arguments.name: topic
arguments.description: The topic or question to predict

prompts.template:
Use the predict tool to run a swarm intelligence simulation on: {{topic}}

Provide the full prediction report, top narratives, and emerging trends.
